permissions.purpose: Reads your payment history to compute your Street Score — successful charges are your payment-history book.
Disputes and their outcomes feed the reliability side of your payment-history book.
Recent balance activity feeds the cash-flow book — how many recent months saw money move.
Your account's age feeds the tenure book. Nothing else is read from the account.

content_security_policy.purpose: The score is computed entirely inside your dashboard from your own Stripe data. Nothing leaves.
